title: I built my own trading indicator after years of testing here’s what it does , on US30
author: Siyabonga_TheGreat
selftext:
I’ve been working on a trading system for a while and finally turned it into an indicator.

It’s based on how I personally trade:

 Uses 4H + 1H for overall direction
 15m / 5m for precise entries
 Marks potential buy/sell zones
 Suggests take profit levels
 Also highlights likely retrace areas before they happen


Work best with us30 , us100 and gold

replies.author: hayehudi613
replies.body:
Hey. I don't know the author from beans. 
But what i will say to you is that you are wrong. 
Why?
Because someone had an idea for 30 years and knows the market well. Just did not know how to code it. So now let's say he used Claude. Great that's fantastic he was able to materialize his dream with 30 years experience and you're knocking him. 

If you tested his algo and said it was crap and a scam that's one thing. But you didn't. 

Full disclosure i don't know anyone here. No one asked me to write it. I'm just proud of people who are able to materialize their dream.

comments.author: Euphoric_Table_7271
comments.body:
After months of research I got tired of overfitting myself.

   Built a pipeline that enforces 3-phase validation

  (IS/OOS/Holdout) from the start, so I can't fool myself

  with backtest results.



  Key features:

  \- Natural language input: ./sb.py "FVG + BOS NY session"

  \- Modular signal generators (ICT/PDA concepts)

  \- Optuna parameter search

  \- Tiered evaluation: A/B/C/D based on OOS profit factor

  \- TradingView integration via CDP

  \- 523 tests



  Repo: [https://github.com/nessos666/nq-strategy-builder](https://github.com/nessos666/nq-strategy-builder)



  Happy to exchange ideas with anyone working on similar

  problems.
